creator: ae@FreeBSD.org
text:
r288529 was merged as noted directly after 1 week.
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=289169

The second revision requires merging of new if_enc(4) from head/, because Marco Zec noticed that this commit could introduce the problem with VIMAGE. I think it should be fixed in new if_enc(4).
